name: AfdxSetSignalReal
title: AfdxSetSignalReal
syntax: long AfdxSetSignalReal( long packet, char signalName[], float value, long fdsStatus ); // form 1
long AfdxSetSignalReal( long packet, long offset, long isDouble, float value ); // form 2
description: This function sets the value of a 32-bit or 64-bit float signal (IEEE 754).

parameters.name: signalName
parameters.description: name of the signal Note: The signal and its message need to be defined in the assigned DBC file.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The offset value points to the float signal in the AFDX payload area.

parameters.name: isDouble
parameters.description: 0: set 32-bit float value 1: set 64-bit float value

parameters.name: fdsStatus
parameters.description: 255: The status is not updated valid status enumeration: The functional status is updated with this value.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
